key_moments.title: Genome over-activates
key_moments.description: Hard density spikes to 83.3%. The genome hasn't learned what to prune yet.

key_moments.title: Pruning complete: 8 of 12
key_moments.description: Layers 1-4 pruned. Only layers 5-12 carry signal.

key_moments.title: Loss breaks 4.0
key_moments.description: Val loss hits 4.00. The sparse network is learning language.

key_moments.title: Loss breaks 3.2
key_moments.description: Val loss 3.18. Approaching GPT-2 quality with 354-param genome.

key_moments.title: Masks sharpening
key_moments.description: Temperature hits 5.0. Soft masks pushed toward binary.

key_moments.title: Layer 1 wakes up
key_moments.description: Hard density rises to 68.2%. Layer 1 re-activates after being dead since iter ~500.

key_moments.title: Best val loss: 3.0406
key_moments.description: Checkpoint saved. This is the model we benchmark.

key_moments.title: Topology locked
key_moments.description: Temperature reaches 10.0. All masks fully binary. Wiring decisions final.
